g.title: Talk through anything \nwe know so far.
anytime->Talk through anything \nwe know so far.
Does it remind you \nof a similar problem?
a->Does it remind you \nof a similar problem?
Can we predict \nor guess the answer?
b->Can we predict \nor guess the answer?
If someone needed a hint, \nwhat do you say?
teach_back->If someone needed a hint, \nwhat do you say?
Did you use concepts \nthat aren't just math concepts?
word_problem->Did you use concepts \nthat aren't just math concepts?
I missed this class. \nExplain what I missed.
h->I missed this class. \nExplain what I missed.
Is the solution a fit \nfor this situation?
c->Is the solution a fit \nfor this situation?
Could we solve this \nusing other methods?
f->Could we solve this \nusing other methods?
What does this mean? \nIn a real-life situation?
g->What does this mean? \nIn a real-life situation?
